source.schemaPurpose: static MissionScript thing-value, engine-helper, vfunc-slot, descriptor-context, and loose-corpus command-name mapping for clean-room planning

handlers.name: IScript__SetThingValueViaVFunc198_FromArg

dispatchContext.boundary: thing vfunc slots and helper names are static dispatch evidence; exact slot meanings, exact enums, and runtime command effects remain unproven

looseMslUsage.boundary: private loose-MSL scan only; command-name usage rows are static corpus context and do not prove live loose-MSL loading or runtime command effects
